title: Twindling Tweaks
description: A mod that adds a little bit of everything, from ores, to trees, to armor. You'll find something you like in this mod.
body:
Welcome to Twindling Tweaks, this is a mod about adding big stuff to the small stuff! I hope you enjoy!

Twindling Tweaks is my very first mod and my first creation using anything code related! 

This mod adds some new items, ores, armor, blocks, and food. Some of which include the new: Alluminite Ore, Salad, and the Mud Block!

This is now a medium sized mod, but I can assure you, it will get bigger!

Stay tuned, because there will be more!

--Originally uploaded to CurseForge--
